title: hieracium sparsum subsp. telekianum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. telekianum, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sparsum subsp. telekianum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
